title: oxalis senecta
intro: Oxalis senecta, also known as the old woman's shoes or false hellebore, is a perennial plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of saponins and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oxalis senecta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Oxalis senecta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
